title: M5: only able to login once
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id Int32, username String, password String, last_login DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO users (id, username, password, last_login) VALUES (1, 'user1', 'password1', NULL);
ALTER TABLE users UPDATE last_login = now() WHERE username = 'user1';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE last_login IS NOT NULL;
